title: Why Koreans Use 'We' Instead of 'I': The Insider's Guide to 'Uri'
keyword: why koreans use we instead of i
summary: Koreans frequently use 'uri' (우리), meaning 'we' or 'our,' even for personal items, to reflect a deep cultural emphasis on collective identity, social harmony, and belonging within groups.
